  "findings": ["Pipe boot is cracked, compromising the roof penetration weatherproofing seal."],
  "actions": ["Immediately replace the cracked pipe boot and inspect surrounding flashing for water damage prior to closing out the roof assembly."],
  "rationale": "A cracked pipe boot allows water intrusion, violating IRC R905 requirements for weather-protected roof penetrations and typical manufacturer installation specifications requiring an intact, sealed flashing assembly. The defect must be corrected before the work can be accepted.",
